title: BeadRecord
description: Schema for a single entry in the bead data lake.

color.description: Primary colour name, e.g. 'dusty rose', 'cobalt blue', 'red'

color_family.description: Normalised colour group for search/filtering: red | orange | yellow | green | blue | purple | pink | brown | white | black | gray | gold | silver | multicolor

finish.description: Surface finish: glossy | matte | transparent | frosted | metallic | iridescent | pearlized | crackle | painted | etched | glow | uv-reactive | other

shape.description: Bead shape: round | oval | tube | flat | bicone | hexagon | rondelle | faceted | drop | cube | heart | star | letter | nugget | chip | coin | barrel | other

material_category.description: High-level material class: glass | silicone | acrylic | metal | ceramic | wood | gemstone | organic | resin | rhinestone | fabric | other

material.description: Specific material sub-type, e.g. 'czech glass', 'lampwork glass', 'millefiori glass', 'sterling silver', 'polymer clay', 'rose quartz', 'howlite'

size_mm.description: Nominal bead diameter in millimetres, e.g. 10 for a 10mm round bead

hole_type.description: Hole construction: center-drilled | large-hole | top-drilled | side-drilled

focal_bead.description: True if this is a focal bead — the central, decorative design element of a piece (typically a character, animal, or saying)

focal_subject.description: Short name of the character or saying depicted, e.g. 'Stitch', 'Highland Cow', 'Mama Bear', 'She believed she could so she did'

is_3d.description: True if the focal bead is a fully 3-D sculpted figurine of the character. False (2-D) means a flat bead ~6–8 mm thick with the character image printed or moulded on both faces.

focal_description.description: Detailed description of the focal bead beyond its subject — pose, colours, style details, holiday variant, etc. E.g. 'Blue alien wearing a Santa hat, seated, with painted details'

embeddings.description: ResNet-50 feature vectors (2048-dim, L2-normalised), one per reference image
